reviews.comment:
Uno de los Acá más hermosos!!!En el mes de febrero marzo del año 1976 tuve la suerte 🍀 de pasar 17 días en villa Mascardi,en el campamento Suyai del colegio ENET N°35 Ingeniero Eduardo Latzina. Que esta al lado de de este ACA.

(Translated by Google)
One of the most beautiful Acá!!! In February/March 1976, I was fortunate enough to spend 17 days in Villa Mascardi, at the Suyai camp of the ENET N°35 Ingeniero Eduardo Latzina school. It is next to this ACA.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5108201586824019782/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBODhmNFNnEAE

reviews.comment:
Muy buena ubicación de la estación de servicio, la vista es para una tarjeta postal. Sería bueno poner más personal, ya que una sola persona atendiendo, despachando y cobrando a tanta cantidad de clientes no da abasto perdí casi 1 hora y media para cargar combustible...

(Translated by Google)
The gas station has a great location; the view is picture-perfect. It would be good to have more staff, as one person serving, pumping, and collecting payment for so many customers is simply not enough. I wasted almost an hour and a half just filling up my tank...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5108201586824019782/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBNy1qUDBRRRAB
